title: Ubiquiti AI PTZ Industrial, 8MP PTZ IP camera, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Speed dome (PTZ)
description: The UniFi Protect family camera features a 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160px) at 30 fps, a varifocal lens (22x optical zoom), and adaptive IR illumination for night vision up to 100 meters. The camera has a durable housing made of aluminum and polycarbonate, with IP66 protection against dust and powerful water jets. It connects to the network via Gigabit LAN with PoE support (42 to 57V DC) and a maximum power consumption of 51W Black color 8MP, 30 FPS video (3840 x 2160px) Night mode with IR LEDs and IR cut filter IP66 weather-resistant housing Advanced AI detection of various objects and events Power via PoE (42 to 57V DC) Managed through UniFi Protect software Compatible with the AI Horn Speaker Device Screws + wall plugs Wall / Pole / Desk mount bracket
